dataList.desc:
Something glowing yellow hurriedly steps in front of us, blocking our path.

"Would you mind stopping for a moment, please?"

"You see... there's a rather fussy child playing with her friends up ahead."

"Keeping the child entertained for as long as she wants is a tall order, so I've been waiting here to lend a helping hand."

"Tell me, which assistance would you like?"<size=0%>

options.messageDesc: Select to apply a survivability-enhancing effect on all allied and enemy units throughout this Section
result: Once they drank the rippling sap, the Sinners seemed to feel noticeably better.<size=0%>

options.messageDesc: Select to apply a damage-enhancing effect on all allied and enemy units throughout this Section
result: We decided to move on together with the butterflies.<size=0%>
We decided to enter the battle without receiving any help.<size=0%>

dataList.desc:
Something glowing yellow is waiting for us.

"Hello. It's been quite a while."

"There's a child waiting all alone up ahead, unable to arrive at the story's ending."

"I've been waiting here to lend a helping hand to anyone who would show the child what it means to end."

"Tell me, which assistance would you like?"<size=0%>

options.messageDesc: Select to apply a survivability-enhancing effect on all allied and enemy units throughout this Section
result: The Sinners melted down the frozen sap and drank it. They seemed to feel noticeably better.<size=0%>

options.messageDesc: Select to apply a damage-enhancing effect on all allied and enemy units throughout this Section
result: We tucked the glittering wing scale away and continued ahead.<size=0%>
We decided to enter the battle without receiving any help.<size=0%>

dataList.desc:
The final stop.

A wayfarer tinged in the glow of the sunset approaches us.

"It would seem there is no need to say much."

"Make yourself comfortable and rest awhile. Of course, feel free to leave now if you're in a hurry."<size=0%>

options.message: Drink the sap and take a good, long rest.
options.messageDesc: Select to apply a survivability-enhancing effect on all allied units throughout this Section
result: The Sinners quenched their thirst with sap and took a proper rest. They seemed to feel noticeably better.<size=0%>

options.message: Rest awhile and depart with the butterflies.
options.messageDesc: Select to apply a damage-enhancing effect on all allied units throughout this Section
result: We followed the butterflies, leaving the site while our fighting instincts were still sharp.<size=0%>
We decided to enter the battle without getting any rest.<size=0%>

dataList.name: Illusory Butterfly of Entangled Lives::The Past Choice Event
dataList.desc:
We managed to peel off the strands of red thread wrapped around the Abnormality.

How should we proceed?<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the first effect of the "Past" Passive:
"When hit by a Sinner, Butterfly of Entangled Lives inflicts Burn and Burn Count on the said Sinner"
result: The illusion disperses, disappearing into the past.<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the second effect of the "Past" Passive:
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives's 'In the Past'-exclusive Skill 'Kalpāgni' gains Final Power and its final Coin inflicts SP damage On Hit"
result: The illusion disperses, disappearing into the past.<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the third effect of the "Past" Passive:
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives inflicts HP Healing Down and Wrath Fragility on Sinners who have enough Burn"
result: The illusion disperses, disappearing into the past.<size=0%>

dataList.name: Illusory Butterfly of Entangled Lives::The Present Choice Event
dataList.desc:
We managed to peel off the strands of red thread wrapped around the Abnormality.

How should we proceed?<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the first effect of the "Present" Passive:
"When Butterfly of Entangled Lives hits Critically, it does not lose Poise Count; gains a large amount of Poise Potency and Count at Turn Start"
result: The illusion disperses, fading into the present.<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the second effect of the "Present" Passive:
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives's 'In the Present'-exclusive Skill 'Smite the Wicked' gains Final Power and its final Coin raises Stagger Threshold On Hit"
result: The illusion disperses, fading into the present.<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the third effect of the "Present" Passive:
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives deals more damage on Critical Hit based on its Poise Potency and Count"
result: The illusion disperses, fading into the present.<size=0%>

dataList.name: Illusory Butterfly of Entangled Lives::The Future Choice Event
dataList.desc:
We managed to peel off the strands of red thread wrapped around the Abnormality.

How should we proceed?<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the first effect of the "Future" Passive:
"Turn Start: Sinners gain Bleed Count"
result: The illusion disperses, crumbling into the future.<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the second effect of the "Future" Passive: 
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives's 'In the Future'-exclusive Skill 'Bloodflower' gains Final Power; On Hit, its final Coin heals HP on self"
result: The illusion disperses, crumbling into the future.<size=0%>

options.messageDesc:
In the Encounter against Butterfly of Entangled Lives::Imago in Section 5, disable the third effect of the "Future" Passive:
"Butterfly of Entangled Lives heals HP every time Bleed is activated on it or the Sinners"
result: The illusion disperses, crumbling into the future.<size=0%>
